sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101561" key="sfaira/rxhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σφαιρ-άρχης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n101561.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">president of the</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σφαιρομαχία</foreign>, Baillet <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Inscr.des tombeaux des rois à Thèbes</tr_> <bibl n="Perseus:abo:pap,P.Holm.:1495" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1495</biblScope></bibl>, cf. <bibl n="Perseus:abo:pap,P.Holm.:1661" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1661</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
